role: This file is the React context definition and typed consumption hook that injects the single AppController into region components without prop drilling.
capabilities: Creates a React context typed as AppController | null
Exports a useApp hook that retrieves the controller or throws if used outside the provider
substance_why: It only declares the context and hook; the Provider and controller logic are implemented in Hud/useAppController elsewhere.
interactions_missing: Provider setup and controller instantiation are not in this file
No loading/fallback state for missing context
No dev-only diagnostics for context scope
performance_risks: Any change to the AppController value will re-render all consumers of AppContext
reuse_why: It is a minimal, typed dependency-injection seam that can be preserved or retyped during the rebuild.
decomposition_hints: If the monolithic AppController is split, this context should be split into multiple focused contexts per domain
